general.name: mos_target_gaia_dr3_synthetic_photometry_gspc
general.description: The Gaia Synthetic Photometry Catalogue (GSPC) is a catalogue of synthetic photometry generated from the Gaia BP/RP mean spectra in Data Release 3 and standardised using wide and reliable sets of external standard stars. For more details, refer to https://gea.esac.esa.int/archive/documentation/GDR3/Gaia_archive/chap_datamodel/sec_dm_performance_verification/ssec_dm_synthetic_photometry_gspc.html.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_gaia_dr3_synthetic_photometry_gspc-[NUM].[FTYPE] with FTYPE='fits', V_TARG='2.0.0', and NUM=1..20 for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

source_id.name: source_id
source_id.description: Unique source identifier (unique within a particular Data Release). Matches the source_id column in the dr20_gaia_dr3_source table.

c_star.name: c_star
c_star.description: BP/RP excess factor corrected for the expected colour dependency

u_jkc_flux.name: u_jkc_flux
u_jkc_flux.description: U flux in the Johnson-Kron-Cousins system

u_jkc_mag.description: U magnitude in the Johnson-Kron-Cousins system

u_jkc_flag.name: u_jkc_flag
u_jkc_flag.description: Flag indicating if G mag and BP-RP color of the source lie in the validated range
